'''sagofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yadnya|yadnya]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yadnya|yadnya]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sagofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sægefeth|sægefeth]] || [[word:sægefej|sægefej]] || [[word:sægefesh|sægefesh]] || [[word:sægefe|sægefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sagogofoth|sagogofoth]] || [[word:sagogofoj|sagogofoj]] || [[word:sagogofosh|sagogofosh]] || [[word:sagogofo|sagogofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sagofoth|sagofoth]] || [[word:sagofoj|sagofoj]] || [[word:sagofosh|sagofosh]] || [[word:sagofo|sagofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sagoffoth|sagoffoth]] || [[word:sagoffoj|sagoffoj]] || [[word:sagoffosh|sagoffosh]] || [[word:sagoffof|sagoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sagofotho|sagofotho]] || [[word:sagofojo|sagofojo]] || [[word:sagofosho|sagofosho]] || [[word:sagofoko|sagofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sagofoth|sagofoth]] || [[word:sagofoj|sagofoj]] || [[word:sagofosh|sagofosh]] || [[word:sagofo|sagofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sagofothol|sagofothol]] || [[word:sagofojol|sagofojol]] || [[word:sagofoshol|sagofoshol]] || [[word:sagofokol|sagofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sagofothotho|sagofothotho]] || [[word:sagofojojo|sagofojojo]] || [[word:sagofoshosho|sagofoshosho]] || [[word:sagofoko|sagofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sagofothon|sagofothon]] || [[word:sagofojon|sagofojon]] || [[word:sagofoshon|sagofoshon]] || [[word:sagofokon|sagofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sagofothoro|sagofothoro]] || [[word:sagofojoro|sagofojoro]] || [[word:sagofoshoro|sagofoshoro]] || [[word:sagofokoro|sagofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
